identificationModule.officialTitle: Pharmacokinetic/Pharmacodynamic Study of Vicagrel Capsules and Clopidogrel Tablets in Healthy CYP2C19 Normal Metabolizers

interventions.name: Vicagrel Capsules
interventions.description: Vicagrel Capsules qd per period, for two periods

interventions.name: Clopidogrel Tablets
interventions.description: Clopidogrel Tablets qd per period, for two periods

primaryOutcomes.measure: Area Under the Curve From Time Zero to Last Quantifiable Concentration(AUC）
